title: Adjusted Present Value Approach: Calculate the present value of a 10000 cash flow expected...
summary: Calculate the present value of a future cash flow or growing perpetuity at a given discount rate.
prompt: Calculate the present value of a $10,000 cash flow expected in 5 years if the discount rate is 8%.
solution: PV = CF / (1 + r)^n = $10,000 / (1 + 0.08)^5 = $10,000 / 1.4693 = $6,735. This calculation is essential for determining the current worth of a future cash flow based on a specified discount rate.
